meta.title: Antibody response to rubella ribonucleoprotein component after natural infection and after immunization -- Ho-Terry and Cohen 14 (1): 141 -- Journal of Medical Microbiology

abstractHtml: Antibody to the ribonucleoprotein component of rubella virus occurs in only a proportion of patients with clinical rubella and is rarely present in individuals after administration of RA27/3 live attenuated virus vaccine.
